meta.title: Stay at Farm El Baya - The Baya Room Under Olive Trees
meta.description: An air-conditioned private room on a permaculture farm in Testour. Private bathroom, direct rate from 180 DT/night, farm breakfast and meals on request.

hero: A private room under the olive trees.
intro: One private room - the Baya Room - with its own bathroom, air conditioning, its own light, and its own quiet. Farm breakfast is available each morning (20 DT). This is not a hotel. It is a living farm that welcomes one stay at a time.

breakfast.heading: What breakfast looks like
breakfast.text: No two mornings taste quite the same. Breakfast is set fresh each day from what the farm and local producers have on hand - farm eggs, olive oil pressed from trees you can see from your window, homemade yogurt, Tunisian flatbreads, seasonal fruit and juice among them. The table changes with the season. That's the point.

cabin.label: COMING SOON
cabin.heading: The Olive Cabin
cabin.text: A standalone cabin being built among the olive trees. Private. Quiet. Its own outdoor kitchen. Its own sky. Join the list to be first to know.

nearby.heading: Nearby - beyond the farm
items: Testour town - 15 min · Pomegranates, Andalusian heritage, local market
Dougga - 20-40 min · UNESCO Roman city, one of North Africa's best preserved
